body:
Please provide as much information as you can:

* **GO term ID and Label**


GO:0003400 | regulation of COPII vesicle coating

* **Reason for deprecation** Put an x in the appropriate box: 

 - [x] The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using [appropriate GO term].


* **"Replace by" term (ID and label)**
If all annotations can safely be moved to that term

COPII vesicle coating (GO:0048208)


* **Are there annotations to this term?**
- How many EXP: 11

NOTE THAT ONE ANNOTATION (human MAPK15) is incorrect.  I'll dispute this one.


* **Any other information**

The proteins annotated to  GO:0003400 | regulation of COPII vesicle coating
are PART_OF the pathway of vesicle coating   (this isn't upstream signalling)

Also, we could rename 
GO:0048208  COPII vesicle coating
to "COPII vesicle coat assembly" (clearer)

and "vesicle coating" to  "vesicle coat assembly"

comments.body:
Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete GO:0003400 regulation of COPII vesicle coating.

* The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using GO:0048208 COPII vesicle coating.

Experimental annotations
SGD 8
UniProt 3

There is one UniRule/UniProtKW mapping.

Annotations can be viewed here: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6389.

This term is being replaced by GO:0048208 COPII vesicle coating.

Any comments can be  added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31945

Thanks,
@dragon-ai-agent please obsolete GO:0003400 regulation of COPII vesicle coating and then rename GO:0048208 and GO:0006901 according to the comment from ValWood.

🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25125757529)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*

title: Obsoletion request: GO:0003400	 regulation of COPII vesicle coating
